name: Feature request
about: Something missing from the classroom demo flow.
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement

     wants the arm or UI to do. "I want to say X and have the arm Y."
     Not in terms of the implementation. -->

<!-- Show what the keyword fallback / Claude prompt currently does

     can — see demo_live/vla.py. -->

## Suggested behaviour

<!-- One or two paragraphs on what should happen. Include rough

## Affected modules (optional)

     vla.py / tasks.py / pipeline.py / __main__.py / etc. -->
